name: Texas French Bread's Fresh Apple Muffins
recipeIngredient: 3 apples (Granny Smith) peeled, cored and cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Lightly grease a 12-cup standard size muffin pan.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the baking soda and both flours. Mix in the sugar, cinnamon, and salt.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and combine with the vegetable oil.
5. Make a well in the dry mixture and pour in the egg-oil mixture. Stir until just combined.
6. Gently fold in the raisins and chopped walnuts until evenly distributed.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared muffin pan, filling each cavity about 2/3 full.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove the muffins from the tin and let cool on a wire rack.
